subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Us unto him who hath inhaled the fragrance of the garment of Our Name, the Most Merciful, and thereby hath attained unto paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی وجد عرف قمیص اسمنا الرحمن و به بلغ الی رضوان
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God as sun, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
